raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ir juhs no Tirus un Zih-
dona/ un wiſſas Wtlisten Roh-
bescbas/ kas irr juhs ar man-
nim jadarra? gribbat juhs man
ko atdoht? Nu tad/ ja juhs man
gribbat ko atdoht/ tad atmakfa-
ichu es juhtu Atdobſchanu abtri
un peepeſchi uhs juhſu Galwu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz ka juhs mannu
Gudrabu/ un mannu Seltu ef-
tat atjehmuscht/ un mannas
dahrgas labbas Leetas juhsu
Deewehtu Nammoſs neſuſchi/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un juhs effat tohs Behr-
nus no Juhda/ un tohs Behr-
nus no Jerufalemes teem Gree-
kereim pahrdetouſchi/ tadeht ka
juhs tohs tahfu no winno Roh-
bescbahn dſihtat.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Neds/ Es uſmohdinascbu
tohs no tahs Weetas/ kurt p
juhs tohs effat pahrdeuſchi/ un
atmaſſacbu juhſu Maffu uhs
juhfahm Galwahm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es pahrdoſchu juhſus
Dehlus/ un juhsas Meitas teem
Behrneem no Juhda Rohſa/
kam tohs buhs teem no Sabas
pahrdoht / weenai Tautai/ tas
tahfu dſihwo / jo tas KUNGS
tir to runnajs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Issanzeet fcho ſtarp teem
Pagakeem / frehtijeet weenu
Karru / pamohdinajeet tohs
Warrenus/ laid ateet un zettahs
wiſſi Karru-Wthri.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kalleet juhs juhsus Lem-
netcus par Sobbinccem/ un juh-
fus Zirpus par Schchperun/tas
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Sapulzejeetees/ un r
zeet jchurp wiſſi Laudis
kahrt/ un fafrahjeetees/
KUNGS nomettihs tai
Warrenus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tee Pagani zelfees/
ees augſcham uhs to Eeleiju
ſawat/ jo tur fehdetchn es /
tohditchu wiſſus Paganius
kahrt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Peeleez to Zirpi / jo
Pkaufchana irr gattawa/
zeet/ no-eita/ jo tas Wil
Spaids irr pilns/ ir tee Sp
pahrtek / jo winnu Btehi
irr leela.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tur buhs Pulki / P
buhs Teefas Eeleija/ jo ta Kl
GA Deena irr tuwu klaht
fas Eeleija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Saule un Mehnes t
aptumſchoti/ un tahs Swa-
nes atrauj ſawur Spoſchum
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS ru
no Zianas/ un no Jerufale-
pazels wiſsch ſawn Balkſint/
la Debbes un Gemnie d
behs. Bet tas KUNGS b
weens Patwerums ſawo
ſchn/ un tas Stiprums to J
eta Behrnu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un juhs fajuttifeet
es eſmu tas KUNGS j
Deews/ kas es us Ziann u
nu ſwehtu Kalau dſihwoja/
Jerufaleme buhs weena ſn
ta Weeta/ un Swetſchi ne pah-
wairs ſaur winnu.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
